title: Anncrawford
compiled_truth: Anncrawford is an external contact at [Aec](companies/aec). Over the corpus period (2000-10-24 to 2001-05-10), Anncrawford sent 17 and received 19 emails, totalling 36 interactions. Top correspondents: [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (17), [Brianday](people/brianday-aec) (4), [Keithmcclelland](people/keithmcclelland-aec) (4), [Ryanmcgeachie](people/ryanmcgeachie-aec) (4), [Danielahorth](people/danielahorth-aec) (3).
